_comment: SD-JWT-VC envelope example for a Sovrn agent credential (Layer 1 D6). Shows the three artifacts of the SD-JWT-VC form: the compact serialization (issuer JWT + disclosures, '~'-separated; signature and digests are illustrative placeholders), the decoded issuer-JWT payload (disclosable claims present ONLY as salted digests in _sd arrays), and the disclosures the holder MAY reveal at presentation. Withholding a disclosure hides that claim from the verifier; the always-disclosed body keeps the credential kind and the claimed actions verifiable either way. Identifiers are sanitized: zone-a, example.si.

disclosures._comment: Each disclosure is base64url([salt, claimName, claimValue]); its digest appears in the matching _sd array above. Values here are the sanitized claim contents.
